questions.question: Explain Backend Development Core Principles Part 2A and its primary use case in Backend Development.
questions.answer: Backend Development Core Principles Part 2A provides a structured mechanism to handle core application logic cleanly.

questions.question: What are common mistakes developers make with Backend Development Core Principles Part 2A?
questions.answer: Common issues include scoping errors, unhandled boundary cases, and improper resource cleanup.

questions.question: How does the Backend Development runtime optimize Backend Development Core Principles Part 2A under the hood?
questions.answer: The runtime engine uses symbol tables, call stack frames, and bytecode optimization to run instructions efficiently.
